name: Hershey's Deep Dark Chocolate Cake - Favorite
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking soda, baking powder, and salt.
2. Add the eggs, milk, vegetable oil, and vanilla extract to the dry ingredients.
3. Mix until well combined, about 2 minutes at medium speed.
4. Stir in the boiling water (the batter will be thin). Pour the mixture into a greased 13x9x2-inch pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes, or until a tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
